scripts.dev: npm run db:up && concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=apps/api && npm run lint --workspace=apps/web
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix --workspace=apps/api && npm run lint:fix --workspace=apps/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/api && npm run typecheck --workspace=apps/web
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=apps/api -- --reporter=spec && npm run test --workspace=apps/web -- --run
